zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Haimor於1520年出生在英國英格蘭戴文艾勒斯亞雷時，她的父親Roger Haimor25歲，母親Jane20歲。她於大約1541年與John William Tucker結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1588年12月22日在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 埃德蒙 馮 金 煙雨 聖 尼古拉斯 阿可斯享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Haimor于1520年出生在英国英格兰戴文艾勒斯亞雷时，她的父亲Roger Haimor25岁，母亲Jane20岁。她于大约1541年与John William Tucker结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1588年12月22日在英国英格兰倫敦聖 埃德蒙 馮 金 煙雨 聖 尼古拉斯 阿可斯享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Haimor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Hamer  .
Slovak (Hámor): metonymic occupational name for a smith, from hámor ‘smithy, forge’, a term of German origin (from Hammer ‘hammer’; see Hammer ).

variants.name: Hamer
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Rochdale, Lancashire, named Hamer, from Old English hamor ‘cliff’.
English (of Norman origin): variant of Amer 3 with prosthetic H-.
Dutch: from hamer ‘hammer’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a maker of hammers or a user of a hammer, for example a blacksmith.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Haimor was born in 1520, in Aylesbeare, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger Haimor, was 25 and her mother, Jane, was 20. She married John William Tucker about 1541. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 22 December 1588, in St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Haimor est née en 1520, à Aylesbeare, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Haimor, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Jane, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John William Tucker environ 1541. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 22 décembre 1588, à St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Haimor 1520 in Aylesbeare, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Haimor 25 und ihre Mutter Jane 20. Sie hat um 1541 John William Tucker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. Dezember 1588 im Alter von 68 Jahren in St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Haimor è nata il nel 1520 nel Aylesbeare, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Roger Haimor, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Jane, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John William Tucker circa 1541. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 dicembre 1588, nel St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Haimorが1520年にイギリスイギリスデボンエイレスベアアで生まれた時，父Roger Haimorは25歳，母Janeは20歳であった。約1541年にJohn William Tuckerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1588年12月22日にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト エドムンド ス キング ウィス スト ニチオラス アコンスで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Haimor(이)가 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 아일레스브이르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Haimor(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1541년 John William Tucker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1588년 12월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 에드먼드 테 킨그 위스 스트 닉홀아스 악스에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Haimor nasceu em 1520, em Aylesbeare, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Haimor, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Jane, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John William Tucker aproximadamente 1541. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 22 de dezembro de 1588, em St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Haimor родилась в 1520 г. в местности аилесбир, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger Haimor было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John William Tucker около 1541 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 22 декабря 1588 г. в местности ст эдмунд т кинг вит ст ничолас акунс, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane Haimor nació en 1520, en Aylesbeare, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Haimor, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Jane, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John William Tucker aproximadamente 1541. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de diciembre de 1588, en St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
